steps.title: Focus on audience size
steps.content: The student's claim is about whether putting a work online increases the number of people who experience it. The strongest support must show that the online image reaches people beyond the in-person museum audience.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant facts
steps.content: B discusses praise from critics, not access. C discusses the museum's reputation among travelers. D describes the museum's collection. None of these shows that online availability increases the audience for a work.

steps.title: Use the access comparison
steps.content: If more people access the online image of Self-Portrait than visit the museum in person, digitization expands who experiences the work. The answer is A.
